changesSummary.application_site: fields.update() — supplierCompany and buyerCompany now use _normalize_invoice_company_name()[0]
changesSummary.previousBehavior: normalization was debug-only (valueDirectChange: False, not applied to actual output)
changesSummary.newBehavior: normalization applied to actual supplierCompany and buyerCompany fields

ruleA_paren_normalization.description: (주), ㈜, (주 ), ( 주) 등 법인 괄호 표기 정규화

ruleB_internal_space_removal.description: 회사명 내 한글 글자 사이 불필요 공백 제거
ruleB_internal_space_removal.note: 기존 re.sub(r'\s+', '', normalized) 로직, T-26a에서 fields output에 실제 적용됨

ruleC_trailing_code_removal.description: 공급받는자 상호 뒤 거래처 코드 제거 (숫자+대문자 혼합 5-12자)
ruleC_trailing_code_removal.condition: 공백 + [A-Z0-9]{5,12} + 문자열 끝, 대문자와 숫자 모두 포함

trailingCodeDecision.reason: 8-char mixed uppercase+digit pattern matches customer code regex. Company name ends with '지점' before the code.
trailingCodeDecision.safety: conservative — requires both digits AND uppercase to qualify as code

unchangedFields: tableRows (itemName, spec, quantity, amount, ...) — 변경 없음
